div.p: One-click two-hop internal transfer: Source → Transit → Destination.

body.p: Creates and chains the two internal transfers needed to send goods from a Source warehouse to a Destination branch via a Transit buffer — automatically, with zero manual picking clicks.
body.h2: How to use — step by step
body.div:
Go to Inventory → Configuration → Warehouses. Open each warehouse and tick:
Is Main Source on the warehouse that supplies goods.
Is Transit on the warehouse that buffers them.
Any warehouse that is not flagged this way is automatically treated as a possible destination branch.
Open Inventory → Operations → Multi-Branch Transfers → Transfers and click New.

div.p: Pick Source, Transit and Destination warehouses (defaults pre-filled from the tags above).
Add product lines with the quantities to ship and click Save.

body.div:
Click Confirm. The module:
Validates the warehouse setup (different locations, same company).
Assigns a sequence reference (MBT/<year>/NNNNN).
Creates the first internal transfer (Source → Transit).
Creates the second internal transfer (Transit → Destination).
Auto-confirms and reserves both pickings when stock is available.
Auto-validates each picking in turn.
Posts a chatter entry for every step.

Open the request to see the status bar (New → In Progress → Main → Transit Done → Transit → Branch Done → Completed), the two smart buttons to jump straight to each transfer, and the full chatter history at the bottom.

ul.li: No stock yet? The request stays at In Progress. The cron job Multi-Branch Transfer: reprocess pending runs every 15 minutes and finishes the chain once stock arrives. You can also call Inventory → Multi-Branch Transfers → Run Reprocess Now.
Cancel? The Cancel button cancels both in-flight pickings and moves the request to Cancelled.
Reset to draft? Managers can reset a non-completed request back to draft. Any in-flight related transfer is automatically cancelled.
mbt.request.line — products / quantities on the request.
stock.warehouse — gains x_is_main_source and x_is_transit flags.

body.p: The module ships with two groups under Inventory → Configuration → User groups → Multi-Branch Transfer:
Multi-company record rules are pre-configured so users only see their own company's requests.
Email ahmedrashedy001@gmail.com or call +20 112 207 9077 for questions or customisations.
